sections.one_line: Case settings for volatility, team size, and case duration
Renamed mappings between Kernos artifacts and legal work products
Initial case workspace structure and required file conventions
Case-management rules for motions, discovery, deadlines, privilege, and phase changes
Maps member intent phrases to Kernos preference hooks and routing actions
Special-case handling for privileged content, multi-plaintiff cases, and transactional canvas renaming
Sanitized transfer of case learnings from case canvases to a practice-level knowledge canvas with attorney approval
